name: CalendarYearViewComponent
description: Component representing the YearView of the Calendar Component.

inputs.name: focusEscapeFunction
inputs.description: Function that is called when the focus would escape the element.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: The id of the calendar passed from the parent component

inputs.name: isDateRangeYearFormat
inputs.description: Whether the date range is year format only excluding month and day

inputs.name: rangeHoverEffect
inputs.description:
Whether user wants to mark year cells on hover.
Works only on range mode, when start year is selected.

inputs.name: yearSelected
inputs.description: Parameter holding the year that is currently selected.

outputs.name: selectedRangeDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected first or last date in range mode is changed

outputs.name: yearClicked
outputs.description: Event fired when a year is selected.

methods.name: loadNextYearList
methods.description: Method used to load the previous {{col * row}} years to be displayed.

methods.name: loadPreviousYearList
methods.description: Method used to load the next {{col * row}} years to be displayed.

methods.name: selectYear
methods.description: Method that sends the year to the parent component when it is clicked.

methods.name: setFocusOnCell
methods.description:
Set focus on month cell.
It can be a selected cell, current month cell or first cell in the list
